lastRunSummary: Built Game 06: Cattle Drive — 13 Playwright tests pass, pushed to main

gameQueue.title: Tin Star Showdown
gameQueue.concept: Top-down quick-draw duel against an AI opponent. Reaction timing, escalating difficulty, best-of-3 rounds.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: 1v1 AI, reaction mechanics, round structure — nothing like it in Games 01-06

gameQueue.title: Dust Devil
gameQueue.concept: Physics-based puzzle: steer a tumbleweed through canyon gaps using wind gusts. Tap to puff, chain gusts for momentum.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: Physics simulation, environmental hazards, puzzle design — first physics puzzle in the series

gameQueue.title: Wanted Poster
gameQueue.concept: Memory/deduction game: study a wanted poster, then identify the outlaw in a saloon crowd before time runs out.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: Cognitive mechanic (first non-physical challenge), procedurally generated faces, crowd NPC behavior

runLog.summary: Built Game 06: Cattle Drive (cattle-drive.html). Flocking AI, wolf predators, 13 tests pass.
